name: Naveen Bellana
tagline: Cybersecurity professional with 4+ years of experience in monitoring, incident response, vulnerability management, and risk assessment across cloud, enterprise, and IT environments. Skilled in automation, security analytics, and compliance frameworks like ISO/IEC 27001, NIST CSF, GDPR, and SOC 2. Experienced with cloud platforms, DevOps processes, and security tools to enhance visibility, streamline workflows, and support effective decision-making and organizational security posture.
